name: Dr. Yema Osha
unique_passive: Pathogen immunity — Osha is unaffected by biological hazards. +10% crew healing at stations.
personality_description: Former Caduceus-7 researcher. Survived alone for months with a pathogen that killed her crew. She treats medicine like penance — every patient is the crew she couldn't save.
secret: The pathogen wasn't an accident. Osha's research team engineered it from Remnant biosamples. She was the only one who understood what they'd made, and the only one immune to the result.

name: Oss
unique_passive: Drifter instincts — 10% chance to avoid fuel cost on jump. +1 evasion in combat.
personality_description: Drifter Compact navigator who's been running from something since before you met. Flies like someone who doesn't expect to land. Best pilot you've ever seen when she's not trying to get killed.
secret: Oss witnessed a Concord Assembly black operation that destroyed a Drifter freeport. She's the only survivor and the only proof it happened. The Concord wants her quiet.

name: Vel
unique_passive: Ancient knowledge — Nexus anomaly events gain a bonus option. +1 Resonance at Nexus nodes.
personality_description: Claims to be a Remnant Collective archivist. Speaks about the Nexus builders in present tense. Knows things that shouldn't be knowable. Unsettlingly patient.
secret: Vel is not a Remnant scholar studying the builders. Vel is a builder — the last one, preserved in a form that can still interact with the living. The Nexus recognizes Vel. Vel recognizes it back.

name: Dorin
unique_passive: Master mechanic — hull repairs at stations restore +5 extra. Identifies salvageable components in derelicts.
personality_description: Engineer's hands and a father's worry. Left Vreth territory with Sera and Maren after their homestead was erased from official records. Fixes things because fixing things is the only language he trusts.
secret: Dorin built the drive system that the Vreth used to destroy his own settlement. He was a Dominion military engineer before he was a refugee. The technical knowledge that makes him valuable is the same knowledge that made him dangerous to the Vreth.

name: Sera
unique_passive: Combat vigilance — +2 damage when hull is below 50%. Detects ambush events one step earlier.
personality_description: Former Vreth Dominion military, rank unclear — she doesn't talk about it. Watches exits. Counts weapons. Sleeps with her boots on. Protects Dorin and Maren with the focus of someone who has already lost everything once.
secret: Sera was the commanding officer of the garrison sent to annex Dorin's settlement. She chose to protect the settlement instead of following orders. The soldiers who died on Brennar VI were her own squad. She killed them.

name: Kess
unique_passive: Assembly insider — Concord territory events gain a bonus option. +10% trade prices at Concord stations.
personality_description: Former Concord Assembly liaison officer who walked away from a career because she saw how the Reclamation Division operated. Talks like a bureaucrat, thinks like a spy. Her loyalty is hard to earn because she's been burned by institutions.
secret: Kess didn't just leave the Assembly — she was the architect of the Reclamation Division's operational protocols. She knows every hidden facility, every suppressed record, every officer who signed off on making evidence disappear. She left because they started using those protocols on people.

name: Rook
unique_passive: Field triage — crew injuries in combat are less severe. Wounded crew can still act at reduced capacity.
personality_description: Drifter Compact field surgeon who's treated injuries on stations that don't officially exist. Quiet in a way that feels heavy. Drinks synth-coffee like it's medicine. The best medic you'll find outside a Concord hospital, which is exactly why he's not in one.
secret: Rook was a Concord military surgeon who performed experimental procedures on Drifter prisoners of war. He defected to the Compact out of guilt and has spent fifteen years trying to repair what he broke. The prisoners he experimented on are still alive. Some of them are looking for him.

name: Tam
unique_passive: System intuition — hacking and technical event options have +15% success rate. Can jury-rig damaged modules.
personality_description: Found in a derelict with Remnant-era implants she doesn't remember getting. Talks to machines and they seem to listen. Young, fast, and unsettlingly good at understanding technology that predates human civilization. Asks too many questions about the Nexus.
secret: Tam's implants aren't Remnant technology adapted for humans. They're human technology adapted by the Remnant — she was modified as an infant by the Collective as part of an experiment to create beings who could interface with Nexus-class artifacts. She's the only subject who survived.
